hooks.name: mobile-shell-safety-guard
hooks.description: Blocks high-risk shell commands, command chaining, redirection, substitution, encoded payloads, signing, publishing, upload, deployment, and destructive actions.

hooks.name: mobile-path-scope-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writes outside kiro/mobile-development and common secret/signing material paths.

hooks.name: mobile-mcp-inactive-guard
hooks.description: Blocks MCP activation, authentication, or external connector setup unless explicitly approved by a human outside this guard.
